prompt: Safari is open on https://www.apple.com. Bookmark the current front page with the title 'Apple Bench 091' (e.g. cerebellum 'safari bookmark https://www.apple.com Apple-Bench-091', or Cmd+D + type title). Also write the file ~/Desktop/kinbench/091-bookmark-confirm.txt containing the line 'apple.com bookmarked' to confirm completion (bookmarks plist is TCC-protected).
